forecast-period.text: A high pressure system south of the Bight extends a ridge over SA. The high will slowly move east over the weekend ahead of a cold front which will slip to the south of SA and weaken. The high will remain near stationary in the southern Tasman Sea, maintaining a ridge across the state early next week.
Wind and wave forecasts are averages. Wind gusts can be 40 per cent stronger than the forecast, and stronger still in squalls and thunderstorms. Maximum waves can be twice the forecast height.
For latest warnings go to www.bom.gov.au, subscribe to RSS feeds, call 1300 659 210* or listen for warnings on relevant TV and radio broadcasts.
* Calls to 1300 numbers cost around 27.5c incl. GST, higher from mobiles or public phones. Marine forecasts are also available on VHF and HF radio. View the radio schedule on www.bom.gov.au/marine
Check the latest Coastal Waters Forecasts for information on wind, wave and weather conditions for neighbouring coastal zones.

area.description: Far West Coast: WA-SA Border to Fowlers Bay

forecast-period.text: North to northwesterly 15 to 20 knots shifting southerly in the evening.
1 to 1.5 metres.
Southwesterly 1.5 metres, decreasing to around 1 metre around midday.
Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm.
South to southeasterly 10 to 15 knots tending east to southeasterly during the afternoon and evening.
1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing below 1 metre during the morning.
Southwesterly around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres during the morning.
The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Mostly sunny day.
Easterly 15 to 20 knots.
Around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres during the morning.
Southwesterly 1.5 metres inshore, increasing to 1.5 to 2 metres offshore.
Sunny.

area.description: Upper West Coast: Fowlers Bay to Elliston

forecast-period.text: Northerly 15 to 20 knots tending southeast to southwesterly 10 to 15 knots in the late evening.
1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing below 1 metre by early evening.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2 metres, decreasing to 1 to 1.5 metres around midday.
Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening.
Southerly 10 to 15 knots turning southeasterly in the evening.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1 to 1.5 metres, increasing to 1 to 2 metres south of Streaky Bay.
The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Mostly sunny afternoon.
East to southeasterly 10 to 15 knots.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2 metres.
Mostly sunny.

area.description: Lower West Coast: Elliston to Cape Carnot

forecast-period.text: North to northeasterly 10 to 15 knots, reaching up to 20 knots offshore in the late morning and early afternoon. Winds turning west to northwesterly in the evening.
1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing below 1 metre by early evening.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2 metres, decreasing to 1 to 1.5 metres during the afternoon, then decreasing to around 1 metre later in the evening.
Southerly around 1 metre.
Partly cloudy. 50% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening.
Northwest to northeasterly 10 to 15 knots tending south to southwesterly before dawn then tending south to southeasterly in the late afternoon.
Around 1 metre.
South to southwesterly 1 to 1.5 metres inshore, increasing to 1 to 2 metres offshore.
Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning.
East to southeasterly about 10 knots increasing to 10 to 15 knots during the afternoon.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2 metres.
Cloud clearing.
Northeasterly 15 to 20 knots turning north to northwesterly 10 to 15 knots in the evening.
1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing to 1 metre by early evening.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2 metres, decreasing to 1 to 1.5 metres by early evening, then decreasing to around 1 metre later in the evening.
Southerly around 1 metre.
Mostly sunny. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the late afternoon and evening.
North to northwesterly 10 to 15 knots tending northwest to southwesterly before dawn then tending southeast to southwesterly in the morning.
Around 1 metre.
Southerly 1 to 1.5 metres, increasing to 1 to 2 metres in the west.
Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning.
Variable about 10 knots becoming easterly 10 to 15 knots during the afternoon.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2.5 metres.
Partly cloudy.
Northeasterly 15 to 20 knots turning northerly 10 to 15 knots in the evening.
1 to 1.5 metres.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2.5 metres, decreasing to 1 to 1.5 metres by early evening.
Below 0.5 metres, tending southerly 1 to 1.5 metres during the afternoon.
Mostly sunny. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Kangaroo Island in the late afternoon and evening.
Northwest to northeasterly 10 to 15 knots tending northwest to southwesterly in the early morning then tending southeast to southwesterly in the morning.
Around 1 metre.
Southerly 1.5 metres, increasing to 1.5 to 2 metres west of Kangaroo Island.
Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning.
South to southeasterly 10 to 15 knots turning easterly during the day.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2.5 metres.
Partly cloudy.

area.description: Upper South East Coast: Murray Mouth to Cape Jaffa

forecast-period.text: Northeasterly 10 to 15 knots, reaching up to 20 knots offshore in the late morning and again in the late evening.
Around 1 metre.
Southwesterly 2 to 2.5 metres.
Sunny.
North to northeasterly 10 to 15 knots, reaching up to 20 knots offshore early in the morning. Winds shifting southerly in the early afternoon.
Around 1 metre.
Southerly 1 to 1.5 metres.
Partly cloudy. 50% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning.
Southerly 10 to 15 knots turning southeasterly below 10 knots during the day.
Below 1 metre.
Southerly 1.5 to 2 metres, tending southwesterly 2 metres during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy.

area.description: Lower South East Coast: Cape Jaffa to SA-VIC Border

forecast-period.text: Northeasterly 10 to 15 knots, reaching up to 20 knots offshore in the late evening.
Below 1 metre, increasing to around 1 metre offshore.
Southwesterly 2.5 to 3 metres, tending southerly 2 to 2.5 metres during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy.
North to northeasterly 10 to 15 knots, reaching up to 20 knots offshore during the morning. Winds shifting south to southwesterly in the early afternoon.
Around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres south of Port MacDonnell.
Southerly 1.5 to 2 metres.
Partly cloudy. 70% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning.
Southerly 10 to 15 knots turning east to southeasterly below 10 knots during the afternoon.
Below 1 metre.
Southerly 1.5 to 2 metres, tending southwesterly 2 metres during the morning.
Cloudy.
Northeasterly 10 to 15 knots, reaching up to 20 knots south of Port Neill to Port Victoria in the evening.
Around 1 metre.
South to southwesterly below 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres south of Cowell to Wallaroo.
Sunny.
North to northwesterly 15 to 20 knots tending northwest to southwesterly 10 to 15 knots in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 knots in the middle of the day.
Around 1 metre.
South to southwesterly around 1 metre.
The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon.
Southerly 10 to 15 knots turning east to southeasterly below 10 knots during the day.
Around 1 metre.
South to southwesterly around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres south of Port Neill to Port Victoria.
Partly cloudy.
Northeasterly 10 to 15 knots becoming variable about 10 knots in the early afternoon then becoming northeasterly 10 to 15 knots in the late afternoon.
Around 1 metre.
West to southwesterly below 0.5 metres.
Sunny.
North to northeasterly 10 to 15 knots shifting south to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending south to southeasterly in the late evening.
Around 1 metre.
South to southwesterly below 0.5 metres.
Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning.
South to southeasterly 10 to 15 knots decreasing to about 10 knots during the day then becoming easterly during the evening.
Below 1 metre.
Southeast to southwesterly below 0.5 metres.
Partly cloudy.
Northeasterly 10 to 15 knots.
Around 1 metre.
West to southwesterly below 1 metre.
Sunny.
Northwest to northeasterly 10 to 15 knots tending northwest to southwesterly in the morning then tending southerly in the late afternoon.
Around 1 metre.
Southerly around 1 metre through the Backstairs Passage, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres during the morning, then decreasing to around 1 metre by early evening.
Partly cloudy. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning.
South to southeasterly 10 to 15 knots tending east to southeasterly during the day.
Around 1 metre.
West to southwesterly around 1 metre.
Partly cloudy.
